use_cases: Displaying structured tabular data in dashboards and admin panels
Presenting lists of items with consistent formatting
Building data grids for SaaS applications
Creating organized layouts for form or user data presentation
Displaying sorted and filtered datasets in web applications
ai_summary: A reusable table component system from Coss.com featuring semantic HTML table elements (table, thead, tbody) with responsive overflow handling. The component includes sophisticated Tailwind styling with rounded corners, subtle shadows, and slot-based composition for flexible frame integration. Designed for displaying structured data with clean visual hierarchy and hover state support.
